capabilities.name: Ask ISA
capabilities.description: RAG-powered Q&A with citations, guardrails, and evaluation

capabilities.name: News Hub
capabilities.description: Ingestion, enrichment, and operational monitoring of regulatory news

capabilities.name: Knowledge Base
capabilities.description: Corpus, embeddings, retrieval primitives, and citation administration

capabilities.name: Catalog
capabilities.description: Canonical regulatory, standards, and governance data registries

capabilities.name: ESRS Mapping
capabilities.description: GS1 and ESRS mapping, gap analysis, and roadmap generation

capabilities.name: Advisory
capabilities.description: Versioned advisory generation, diffing, and publication views

shared_platform.description: Cross-cutting surfaces without single capability ownership

coverage_validation.notes: All top-level appRouter surfaces are assigned to one capability or SHARED_PLATFORM.
